title: Lesson 153: 財布, 魚, 先...

items.gloss: a short while ago; a moment ago; just now; some time ago

point; tip; end; nozzle; head (of a line); front; first; before; ahead (of); (the way) ahead; beyond; future; previous; prior; former; recent; last; destination; rest (e.g. of a story); continuation; remaining part; the other party
